1.premise: Black people are less uptight about race than white people, proven when a customer uses his race as a locator at a ski resort.
White anxiety is widely understood about race talk but rarely said aloud.

2.premise: Being Black at a ski resort could be a better locator than a car model.

lines.text: - In my experience,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: black people,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: listen,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: are less uptight about race than white people are.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You feel how tense the white people are?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I used to drive DoorDash into ski town
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And let's be honest, not a lot of black people ski.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I was driving DoorDash.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This is a true story.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And I pulled into a busy parking lot
lines.label: setup

lines.text: at the base of the ski village to drop off an order.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I called up my guy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, hey, I got your food.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm pulling up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm in a silver Nissan Rogue.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And he said, all right, I'm black.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I found him.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I was surprised he said that.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But he was being helpful.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And actually,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: he was more helpful than I was because
lines.label: tag

lines.text: there were more silver Nissan Rokes and black people in that parking lot.
lines.label: tag
